title: Fix admin access control - isOwner returns false for authenticated owner

requirements.text: Fix the backend isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' and return true when this principal makes the admin check call
acceptanceCriteria: The backend isCallerAdmin method returns true when called by principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae'
The frontend debug info displays 'isOwner value: true' when the authenticated owner accesses the admin route
The admin panel is accessible to the authenticated owner without showing 'Access Denied'

requirements.text: Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method to output the exact principal comparison: log the caller principal as text, the stored owner principal as text, whether they are equal, and the data types being compared
acceptanceCriteria: Backend logs show the exact caller principal text representation
Backend logs show the exact stored owner principal text representation
Backend logs show the boolean result of the principal equality comparison
Logs are visible in the canister console during admin access attempts

requirements.text: Verify the owner principal initialization in backend/main.mo is correctly storing the admin token from initialization arguments and confirm the stored principal matches '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae'
acceptanceCriteria: Backend initialization logs confirm the admin token was received from init args
Backend logs show the exact principal extracted from the admin token matches the expected value
The ownerPrincipal variable is correctly set during canister deployment

requirements.text: Update the frontend App.tsx admin route to display more detailed debug information when access is denied, including the raw backend response, any error messages, and the exact boolean comparison result
acceptanceCriteria: The access denied screen shows the raw backend isCallerAdmin response value
Any backend errors or exceptions are displayed in the debug info
The frontend console logs show the complete authentication flow and decision path

constraints: Do not modify the Internet Identity authentication flow
Preserve the existing admin panel UI and functionality
nonGoals: Implementing role-based access control beyond owner verification
Changing the admin panel statistics or analytics features
Modifying the frontend Layout component's admin button visibility logic
